rows.finalText: "What is the next right step in my calling" is best read here through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Coffin (8) in Past sets the tone with release an outdated pattern gracefully. Coffin often points to the part of the old path that has already finished, and the rest that is needed before anything genuinely new can take root in your calling.
